text: Standing outside the glass, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The interior calls me in with its color, light, and intellectual energy. When I step inside, the display’s text about care, reflection, and intentionality resonates with me. The notion of optimism and growth—literal and figurative—within institutional walls stirs a gentle hopefulness amid the inevitable undercurrent of bureaucracy. I am both inspired and contemplative, embraced by the possibilities of research, development, and human collaboration.
